title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
BSNL Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
